summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MEDVET INTEGRATIVA features: Team Page with Dra. Tabatha's real photo, Blog Page, Symptom Calculator, and Testimonials with video URL support. All backend APIs (16/16 tests passed) and frontend UI components working correctly.

minor.issue: Some 401 errors appear in console for authenticated endpoints when user is not logged in - this is expected behavior but could be handled more gracefully

route_discrepancy.issue: Symptom Calculator route is /calculadora-tratamento but test request mentioned /calculadora-sintomas

passed_tests: Team Page (/equipe) loads with mentor section
Mentor name 'Dra. Tabatha Novikov Ribeiro de Andrade' displayed correctly
All 6 team member cards render with images, names, specialties
Blog articles show categories, authors, read times
GET /api/blog returns blog articles with correct structure
Interactive symptom selection works (pet type, symptoms, severity)
Calculator shows treatment recommendations after submission
Restart button returns to symptom selection
Testimonial form has video_url input field
Admin login works with correct credentials
seed_data_creation: Blog articles, testimonials, and symptom calculator data are seeded via server.py startup functions
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features (Team Page with real photo, Blog, Symptom Calculator, Testimonials with video URL) are working correctly. The symptom calculator route is /calculadora-tratamento (not /calculadora-sintomas as mentioned in request). Backend test file created at /app/backend/tests/test_medvet_features.py covers Blog API, Symptom Calculator API, Testimonials API, Auth API, and Products API.
